name: linkatlas
description: Local-first personal knowledge manager for collecting, summarizing, linking, and querying saved URLs.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/contracts packages/domain packages/storage apps/desktop/tsconfig.main.json apps/desktop/tsconfig.preload.json tests && tsc -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
